name: AS7341 Spectral Color Sensor
description: The `as7341` sensor platform allows you to use your AS7341 spectral color sensor ([datasheet](https://look.ams-osram.com/m/24266a3e584de4db/original/AS7341-DS000504.pdf), [Adafruit](https://www.adafruit.com/product/4698)) with ESPHome. The [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this sensor to work.

config_entries.label: Astep
config_entries.description: The number of integration steps. Default is `599`. Must be between `0` and `65534`.

config_entries.label: Atime
config_entries.description: The integration time per step in increments of 2.78µs. Default is `29`. Must be between `0` and `255`.

config_entries.label: Clear
config_entries.description: The reading for the clear channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F1
config_entries.description: The reading for the 415nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F2
config_entries.description: The reading for the 445nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F3
config_entries.description: The reading for the 480nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F4
config_entries.description: The reading for the 515nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F5
config_entries.description: The reading for the 555nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F6
config_entries.description: The reading for the 590nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F7
config_entries.description: The reading for the 630nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: F8
config_entries.description: The reading for the 680nm channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: Gain
config_entries.description: The gain used by the device. A higher gain may be more suitable for lower-light environments. Must be one of:

config_entries.label: Nir
config_entries.description: The reading for the NIR (near-infrared) channel. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).
